caption: The video shows a person's hands holding open a catalog or booklet that features various designer series papers. The page displayed is titled "DESIGNER SERIES PAPER" and includes detailed information about the paper sizes, designs, and colors available. The specific section highlighted is for "Beauty of the Earth 12" x 12" (30.5 x 30.5 cm) Designer Series Paper," which comes in 12 sheets with 6 double-sided designs. The person's left hand, wearing a white smartwatch, points to the text while their right hand holds the page steady. The background includes a cutting mat with grid lines, suggesting a crafting or scrapbooking setup. The video likely serves as a tutorial or review of the designer series papers for crafting enthusiasts.
